creator: mzaki@e-mail.ne.jp
text:
The web interface for send-pr (http://www.freebsd.org/send-pr.html) is
working correctly, but its translated japanese version
(http://www.freebsd.org/ja/send-pr.html) doesn't work.

Of course, I have filled all forms with English and exactly correct CAPTCHA
string.  However, the server has sent the following error message:

Incorrect confirmation code

You need to enter the correct code from the image displayed. Please return
to the form and enter the code exactly as shown. Thank you.

How-To-Repeat: Visit http://www.freebsd.org/ja/send-pr.html,
fill forms in English as same as http://www.freebsd.org/send-pr.html,
give correct CAPTCHA string, and submit.
